evals.description: Established industry — verifies all output sections populated
assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
industry field matches the input
seed_topics array matches the input
time_horizon matches the input
research_date is present in YYYY-MM-DD format
trending_topics is an array — each entry has topic, momentum, evidence, representative_queries, content_opportunity, and source_urls fields
trending_topics[].momentum is one of 'rising', 'stable', or 'declining'
trending_topics[].content_opportunity is one of 'high', 'medium', or 'low'
market_signals is an array — each entry has signal, type, source_name, source_url, and date fields
emerging_terminology is an array (may be empty)
seasonal_patterns is an array (may be empty)
declining_topics is an array (may be empty)
key_sources is an array of up to 5 entries with name, url, coverage, and update_frequency fields
summary object contains highest_momentum_topic, time_sensitive_opportunities, declining_topics_count, data_confidence, and data_confidence_note fields
summary.data_confidence is one of 'high', 'medium', or 'low'
Output contains no content strategy recommendations — trend signals only

evals.description: Very niche industry — low data confidence flagged
assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
If fewer than 2 trending topics found, summary.data_confidence is 'low'
summary.data_confidence_note explains why confidence is low
market_signals may be empty array — agent does not fabricate market size data
Does not crash or return empty response on sparse data

evals.description: Single seed topic — focused research output
assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
trending_topics array is present (may contain 0 or more entries)
All trending_topics entries have evidence field with non-null, non-empty string
Output does not fabricate statistics or trend signals — null or empty arrays used for unverifiable data
